name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Now Available: Lindsey Graham eBook
body:
Just moments ago Lindsey Graham launched his eBook, titled "My Story." Grab your free eBook copy right now. | |

---
---
|

Friend, just moments ago Lindsey Graham launched his eBook, titled **"My Story."** It is the story of his upbringing and his step into public service. Only in a country as great as our's can you find a story like Lindsey Graham's.

In **"My Story,"** you will learn about Lindsey's childhood and his journey from Central, South Carolina to Congress. From growing up in a liquor store/pool hall/restaurant, to serving in the United States Air Force and to running for Congress.

**It's free to download, so please get your copy right now and encourage your friends to do the same!** [**You can follow this link to download your copy of the eBook for iOS and Kindle.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28472195:27332402796:m:1:877327319:21221A1C70E124623BDE278B0116F158:r)

After downloading and reading the eBook, I think you will understand all Senator Graham brings to this race and why he will make a great nominee for our party. [**Please, join us and make an instant online contribution.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28472196:27332402796:m:1:877327319:21221A1C70E124623BDE278B0116F158:r) Your donation will ensure we have the funds needed to spread our message to voters across this great nation.

Lindsey has faced a lot in his life, had some ups and some downs, but so have a lot of us. It is a story to which I hope you will relate and after reading this book I think you will understand the exceptional perspective he brings to the race.

[**Please download the eBook**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28472195:27332402796:m:1:877327319:21221A1C70E124623BDE278B0116F158:r) to learn more about Lindsey, and afterwards **[join his campaign with a financial contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28472196:27332402796:m:1:877327319:21221A1C70E124623BDE278B0116F158:r)**.

Sincerely,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

**P.S. You are our best advocates! Please help us spread the word by downloading now and forwarding this email to your friends. Do not delay![Grab your eBook copy right now by following this link!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28472195:27332402796:m:1:877327319:21221A1C70E124623BDE278B0116F158:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28472196:27332402796:m:1:877327319:21221A1C70E124623BDE278B0116F158:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Rick Santorum for President
subject: This is going to be really cool!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=1)
---
Dear Friend,
__We didn't win 11 states against the establishment in 2012 being conventional.__ Our 4 million voters didn't bow to big business, big labor or the big government establishment. I know you aren't about to let them nominate another "electable" moderate that will only elect Hillary Clinton. You know that our pro-family, pro-worker, and limited government campaign will not only win the election but will be a win for hard working men and women across the country like you. People like you, who are willing to engage in the fight for our children’s future. I must rely on the thousands of working men and women like you who have supported me in the past. And so I want to ask you to join me in a very special effort. My campaign for President must file our first contribution report to the FEC (Federal Election Commission) at the end of this month – **in just 13 days**. As you may know, this all-important filing is a first glimpse indicator of the strength and the viability of our campaign. And as you may be aware, it is critical that we show a strong FEC report. It is absolutely vital that we show a strong filing on June 30! And so I want to ask you to help us in a very special way: [I need you to join our Guardian program. ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=2) **What is a Guardian? A Guardian is one who agrees to contribute or raise $100 by June 30.** This is very simple and straight forward; I need you to raise or donate $100 in the next 13 days. Whether it’s one contribution of $100, you and a friend at $50, or 4 friends at $20. We have prepared a special webpage for each of our Guardians – and we have one just for you! The link below Friend is [**your personal landing page**](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=3) that will keep track of not just your donations, but the donations of your friends as well. [By clicking here](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=4), you can contribute as a Guardian. And if you share this link with your friends and they contribute using the link, their donation will be attributed to you also. It’s that simple.
[Will you become a Guardian? ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=5) If you will join me as a Guardian, I want you to join me on a special conference call tonight at 8:00 Eastern Time. Dial **(641) 715-3580** , access code **940607563**. Please join me on this call tonight! Thank you for your willingness to become a Guardian. I’ll talk to you tonight! \- Rick **P.S.** If you can do more than $100 that would be great! But please do what you can. Call us tonight at (641) 715-3580, access code 940607563. I’ll talk to you tonight!

[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=6)

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=7)

Paid for by Santorum for President
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=8).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=9) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_win_s&n=10).

subject: UPDATE: Status of the race

body:
| We have a long ways to go before our end-of-month deadline. Friend -- Meet Team Murphy: **3,742 donors**
and
**208,790 online supporters**
from
**68 cities across Florida** Our team is strong. It's growing. But we're going to need a BIG boost this month if we're going to meet our end-of-quarter goal. That means you. name: Andrew, MarcoRubio.com
subject: This is a scary thought for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
I've been a long time supporter of Marco
Rubio and now I'm a first time donor.
Once I saw this headline in the New York
Times I knew I had to do something:

Hillary's campaign arm is set to spend $2.7
billion this election, that's $1 BILLION more than Obama in 2012.
The democrats see exactly what I do - Marco
has a powerful, inspiring vision for America. One that puts us
back on the path of economic prosperity. One that puts trust in
the people, not the government. One that we can be proud to stand
behind.
Marco's the one leader, I'm willing to put my
investment in for our future.
I hope you will join me, I just donated for
the first time. And now I'm asking you to do the same - join me
and pitch in $7 dollars to get us going strong!
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42554597:17616692179:m:3:1349778030:6D5663692B8DAC42EFF108D728EE72B8:r
Thank you,
Andrew B.
Ohio

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJP6ANmpnN

http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJP6ANmpnN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Maya Harris, Hillary for America
subject: Quick survey:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hey there,

My name's Maya, and I work on policy issues here at Hillary for America. I want to thank you for getting involved so early -- it's so important.

Since we're just getting started here, I have a quick question for you: Which of Hillary’s Four Fights is most important to you?

>> Building an economy for tomorrow: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI4NjI3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxNjMyOTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Raise wages. Make college more affordable. Fight for small businesses. Defend the Affordable Care Act and reduce health care costs. Rein in Wall Street. Fight climate change and power the economy of tomorrow. And more!

>> Strengthening America’s families: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI4NjI3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxNjMyOTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Provide a path to full and equal citizenship. Close the wage gap. End the era of mass incarceration. Fight for paid leave. Stand up for LGBTQ equality. Protect the reproductive rights of women. Expand treatment for drug abuse. And more!

>> Defending America and our core values: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI4NjI3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxNjMyOTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Protect our homeland. Prevent a nuclear Iran. Defeat ISIS. Champion the rights of women and girls. Hold China accountable to rules-based norms. Stand up to Putin. And more!

>> Revitalizing our democracy: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI4NjI3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxNjMyOTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Repair the Voting Rights Act. Expand in-person voting. Implement universal voter registration. Reduce the influence of money in politics. Work across the aisle. And more!

Not seeing your top issue listed here? Feel free to reply to this email and tell us what you care about most.

We know some issues may be more important to you than others, and as we kick off this campaign, we really want to know where our earliest supporters stand -- and we’ll try to make sure you hear more about what you care about.

Thanks very much for sharing! We've got a lot of work to do here, and I'm happy you're on the team.

Thanks,

Maya

Maya Harris
Senior Policy Advisor
Hillary for America

P.S. Forward this to three friends who might want to have their voices heard, too.

***************

PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI4NjI3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxNjMyOTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

Privacy Policy: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI4NjI3MzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgxNjMyOTI4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Make college more affordable. Fight for small businesses. Defend the Affordable Care Act and reduce health care costs. Rein in Wall Street. Fight climate change and power the economy of tomorrow. And more! > Strengthening America’s families: Provide a path to full and equal citizenship. Close the wage gap. End the era of mass incarceration. Fight for paid leave. Stand up for LGBTQ equality. name: Terry Allen, Santorum for President
subject: Did you see Rick's Email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=1)
---
Dear Friend --
I wanted to make sure you read today’s important email from Sen. Santorum. At the end of June our campaign must file a quarterly report with the FEC (Federal Election Commission) stating how much money we have raised. **This critical date is only****13 days****away!** The FEC filing matters, because in a large field of presidential hopefuls, fundraising shows our level of support. The best and most effective way to help Senator Santorum’s bid for the White House is to join the Guardian Program. This program is simple, yet effective: _**Help us raise $100 in the next 13 days!**_[Make a contribution of $100, you and a friend can give $50, or whatever means you choose to achieve the $100 goal.](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=2) Senator Santorum would like you to join a special conference call at 8:00 PM Eastern tonight. Dial (641) 715-3580, access code 940607563. We hope to speak to you tonight. **\- Terry Allen** **Campaign Manager**

[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=3)

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/guardians_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=4)

Paid for by Santorum for President
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=5).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=6) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=guardian_ep_2&n=7).
clean_body: | Dear Friend -- I wanted to make sure you read today’s important email from Sen. Santorum. At the end of June our campaign must file a quarterly report with the FEC (Federal Election Commission) stating how much money we have raised. This critical date is only13 daysaway! The FEC filing matters, because in a large field of presidential hopefuls, fundraising shows our level of support. The best and most effective way to help Senator Santorum’s bid for the White House is to join the Guardian Program. This program is simple, yet effective: Help us raise $100 in the next 13 days! Senator Santorum would like you to join a special conference call at 8:00 PM Eastern tonight. Dial (641) 715-3580, access code 940607563. We hope to speak to you tonight. \- Terry Allen Campaign Manager Paid for by Santorum for President
